task_text: Create an isolated CI/test harness for send-path tests. Linux pytest job or isolated VPS/worktree with no live WhatsApp bridge. safe_io.BRIDGE_URL must default to a fake sink during tests. Tests must fail if they attempt 127.0.0.1:3000 or any live bridge URL. In-process tests must provide action_context or use an explicitly reviewed allowlist. Keep the bridge pytest-guard; do not weaken it. Add regression coverage proving send tests cannot hit live bridge. Codex review must include regulated-intent/money-audit lens + Hermes/drift lens.
